title: Visual Vanilla Enhancements
description: A Visual Enhancing Modpack. For 1.21.9 (1.21.10 Coming Soon!)
body:
# Features
Visual Vanilla Enhancements is a modpack attempts to improve visual effects of the game, and adds things like 3D crops, 3D ladders, 3D skin layers, ambient sounds, animated items, unique axolotl buckets, a better looking statistics screen, a centered crosshair, shaders, a detailed armor bar, unique GUI textures, enhanced explosions, better looking screen shots, 3D Food, 3D music discs, dynamic lighting, better looking rain, better spawn eggs, enhanced torches, better font, wavey capes. But also simpler things like higher frame rates and more particals. You may also add or diable any mods, resource packs, or visual enhancements you want!
# The Projects (63)

- Enitiy Model Features
- Enitiy Texture Features
- Enitiy Sound Features
- 3D Skin Layers
